default_wiring.dashagent/executor.py: AgentExecutor.run default strategy now uses PACKAGED_DEFAULT_STRATEGY
default_wiring.dashagent/planner.py: PACKAGED_DEFAULT_STRATEGY constant set to candidate; strategy remains explicit applied-trial strategy with SQL_FIRST execution base
default_wiring.scripts/check_submission_ready.py: readiness now expects the packaged default candidate and requires packaged trajectories to use it
default_wiring.scripts/package_query_outputs.py: submission strategy env fallback now uses PACKAGED_DEFAULT_STRATEGY; internal da500 and diagnostic output dirs excluded from packaging discovery
default_wiring.scripts/run_one_query.py: CLI default strategy now uses PACKAGED_DEFAULT_STRATEGY and choices include all explicit strategies

rollback_instructions: Set PACKAGED_DEFAULT_STRATEGY in dashagent/planner.py back to SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY.
Reset AgentExecutor.run, DEFAULT_AGENT_STRATEGY, package_query_outputs, run_one_query, and check_submission_ready expectations to SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY.
Regenerate package outputs with python3 scripts/package_query_outputs.py and rerun python3 scripts/check_submission_ready.py plus python3 scripts/run_dev_eval.py --strict.
